title: Forged Reactor
description: A Forge mod which adds Tony Stark's Iron Man Armor (from Marvel) into Minecraft!
body:
### **Presented by Maketendo & Westankrang** ![Forged Reactor Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b490d242524f968eed2997d8282d4e23b2e8a3c.png)   [](https://modrinth.com/mod/forged-reactor) [](https://files.minecraftforge.net) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forged-reactor)

WARNING

**While in development I was busy and fully forgotten about this project, In due time I remembered and it was nearly at the state of finishing - by nearly things may not be in the mod such as recipes and lack of documentation so please don't ask for how to craft things! just use the JEI mod to find out and if theres no recipes i'll try my best to add it into the next version if I have time.** ## Summary This mod focuses around the hero you may know as Tony Stark (:< (aka Iron Man) and adds his armor to Minecraft! This mod allows you to create custom armor too with datapacks :D but if you want to create custom armor with a custom model you will have to make that in MCreator if you do not know how to code! ## What's in this mod: - Armor Widthdrawer Block - Iron Armor Mk. 1-9 - Battery Item - Iron Armor Suitcase Item - Armor Modification Configurator Block - Upgrade Template Item ## Any videos on it? It's also supported and inspired by a mod made by [Duzo](https://modrinth.com/user/Duzos) called [Timeless Heroes](https://modrinth.com/mod/superhero)
